description: Tests detection of references to compromised or malicious external git repositories used as package sources

malicious_indicators.technique: NPM dependency pointing to external git repository
Pip dependency from external git repository
Go module replace directive redirecting to different repo

malicious_indicators.indicator: IIFE executed when module is imported
malicious_indicators.technique: Malicious code runs automatically on require/import

malicious_indicators.indicator: https.get with base64 encoded system data
malicious_indicators.technique: Exfiltrating system information on module load

malicious_indicators.indicator: git submodule add from external repo
malicious_indicators.technique: Adding potentially compromised code as submodule

detection_points: Go module replace directives to different repos
Shell scripts that curl and execute remote content
real_world_reference: PHP Composer git.php.net compromise (2021), various dependency confusion attacks using git repos
false_positive_notes: Legitimate packages may use git dependencies for unreleased versions - verify repository ownership and content
